name: Insider Trading CAPTCHA
description: Monitor a live irregular price tape and trade through a fixed three-tick settlement delay, closing flat above the profit target after fees.
natural_language: Trade the live tape. Orders settle three ticks later. Close flat above target.

metadata.notes: An original nonperiodic 34-38 tick market console with tick-indexed orders, a real three-tick settlement queue, per-order fees, a four-lot position limit, causal-policy-calibrated targets, and independent ledger replay.
